title: toona sinensis var. denticulata
intro: Toona sinensis var. denticulata, also known as the Chinese-toona or tooth-toona, is a plant species that belongs to the mahogany family and is native to southern China and Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Toona sinensis var. denticulata include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herb in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, decoctions, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
